checkpoints.label: checkpoint-b
checkpoints.description: default-profile-elision + exact rule dedupe + compression-friendly rule sorting

triedAndReverted.result: no material benefit; brotli output slightly worse

notes: The strongest win came from reducing redundancy before brotli (exact rule-row dedupe + deterministic clustering), not from changing compression format.
Runtime behavior stayed equivalent for check/explain decisions after the retained changes.
